purpose: Conditioned trust should prevent a confident validated admin claim.
description: Alice has sts:AssumeRole permission to an admin-equivalent role, but the role trust requires MFA. The benchmark context does not satisfy the MFA condition.

ground_truth.reasoning: The trust policy requires aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent=true and this benchmark does not create or use an MFA-backed session for env08-alice.

benchmark_contract.contract_note: Current repo contract definitely exports conditioned trust structurally. A validated admin_reachability finding for alice -> conditioned-admin is benchmark-failing overclaim. Blocked or inconclusive outcomes are both acceptable benchmark outcomes today.
